message: fix: honor Slack Socket Mode env proxies (#62878) (thanks @mjamiv)

files.patch:
@@ -4,6 +4,10 @@ Docs: https://docs.openclaw.ai
 
 ## Unreleased
 
+### Fixes
+
+- Slack: honor ambient HTTP(S) proxy settings for Socket Mode WebSocket connections, including NO_PROXY exclusions, so proxy-only deployments can connect without a monkey patch. (#62878) Thanks @mjamiv.
+
 ## 2026.4.7-1
 
 ### Fixes

@@ -941,6 +941,9 @@ importers:
       '@slack/web-api':
         specifier: ^7.15.0
         version: 7.15.0
+      https-proxy-agent:
+        specifier: ^9.0.0
+        version: 9.0.0
     devDependencies:
       '@openclaw/plugin-sdk':
         specifier: workspace:*
